title: Hart, Simon - Parliamentary Secretary to the Treasury (Chief Whip), Cabinet Office - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Hart left his role at the Cabinet Office in July 2024.  Consultant, 8hwe Ltd  Mr Hart sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with 8hwe Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
